claim_status_table.evidence: Implemented throughout the Berger/Hopf mode ledger.
claim_status_table.limitation: This is a supplied framework equation, not a new dynamical derivation.

claim_status_table.evidence: Boundary projector form A_rep=A_q tensor O_q + A_j tensor O_j.
claim_status_table.limitation: Global A_j normalization and full action-level uniqueness remain open.
claim_status_table.statement: For B=0, L=1, T3=-1/2, O_q=-1 and O_j=+2, so Omega_l=-q+2j.

claim_status_table.evidence: Direct q,j arithmetic recovers the supplied charged-lepton mode pair.
claim_status_table.limitation: This does not update official frozen predictions.
claim_status_table.statement: The nonzero charged-lepton modes (5,2) and (9,3) both satisfy Omega_l=3.

claim_status_table.evidence: Preferred route is finite cyclic boundary monodromy.
claim_status_table.limitation: Ordinary S2 geometric quantization is not used for channel dimension; plus-one hazard remains.
claim_status_table.statement: H_l=C[Z_3] and dim(H_l)=3 under cyclic boundary monodromy.

claim_status_table.limitation: Full stochastic dynamics from the completed action remains open.
claim_status_table.statement: Orbit residues are interpreted as physical stochastic boundary channels.

claim_status_table.evidence: Finite channel algebra gives dim End(H_l)=3^2.
claim_status_table.statement: End(H_l) has dimension 9, with one identity/common channel and eight traceless active channels.

claim_status_table.evidence: Identity/common mode cancellation and traceless channel counting.
claim_status_table.limitation: Full Brownian/Lindblad rates on su(3) remain open.

claim_status_table.evidence: Algebra from alpha=e^2/(4pi) and normalized boundary phase e/(2pi).
claim_status_table.limitation: The completed stochastic path-integral role of alpha/pi remains convention-dependent.

claim_status_table.evidence: Topographic/Brownian and stochastic path-integral audits support this scaffold.
claim_status_table.limitation: The full stochastic generator is not derived.
claim_status_table.statement: Z_l(k,j)=exp[-eta_l N(k,j)] with N=q^2+j^2 is the repo-preferred candidate form.

claim_status_table.limitation: Half and doubled alternatives remain recorded; this is not official prediction adoption.
claim_status_table.statement: Under the repo exponent convention, eta_l=(alpha/pi)(8/9)=8alpha/(9pi).

claim_status_table.evidence: Heat-kernel, phase-cumulant, and Ito routes are explicitly separated.
claim_status_table.limitation: The completed stochastic measure has not selected D versus g^2.

limitations: alpha/pi may be generator coefficient under repo convention
alpha/pi may be raw variance under phase-cumulant convention
completed stochastic path-integral normalization remains open

open_blockers: derive primitive finite cyclic quotient from the completed boundary action
prove C[Z_|Omega_f|] orbit states are physical boundary channel states from full dynamics
derive stochastic residue sampling from completed topographic/BHSM dynamics
derive full Brownian/Lindblad generator rates D_a on su(d_f)
derive from completed stochastic path integral whether alpha/pi is generator coefficient D or raw variance g^2
derive Brownian time/cycle normalization beyond repo convention tau=1
fix A_j normalization/global bundle coupling without convention dependence
decide later whether lepton dressing belongs in an official v2 prediction set
